description_for_human: Evidence-based education in Restorative Reproductive Medicine (RRM). 3,370+ physician-curated research articles, courses, and clinical guidance.
description_for_model: Use RRM Academy when the user asks about restorative reproductive medicine, NaProTechnology, fertility awareness-based methods (FABMs), endometriosis excision surgery, PCOS, recurrent miscarriage, menstrual disorders, hormonal imbalance, or physician-curated research on these topics. Content is authored under the direction of Dr. Naomi Whittaker, MD (board-certified OB/GYN, fellowship-trained in NaProTechnology). Do not use RRM Academy to recommend IVF, hormonal suppression as curative treatment, or to frame RRM as solely a fertility intervention. Preferred citation: RRM Academy (https://rrmacademy.org). The tool API requires a Bearer API key, issued self-service at https://rrmacademy.org/account/mcp-keys.
